ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic status (e.g., At-Risk, Transitional, Distressed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic status */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the economic status */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the economic status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the economic status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "index" REAL /* Economic health index for the county */,
  "index_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the county based on the economic health index */,
  "index_percentile" REAL /* Percentile of the county based on the economic health index */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic status of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county for the specific year */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the county for the specific year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county for the specific year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county for the specific year */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the county for the specific year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the county for the specific year */,
  "housing_cost" REAL /* Average housing cost in the county for the specific year */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the county for the specific year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES economic_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which economic data is recorded */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year for more granular data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for more granular data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data used for visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used for visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the visualization */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
